section4.question: What does an acknowledgment letter from CSLB mean?
options: CSLB has received and entered your application for processing

section4.question: How long does it usually take to receive an acknowledgment letter after applying?
options: About two to three weeks, though it can vary

section4.question: What is one of the most common instructions in an acknowledgment letter?
options: Skip fingerprinting until after the exam
Complete Live Scan fingerprinting promptly to move forward
Begin working as a contractor immediately

section4.question: What should you do if you see incorrect information in your acknowledgment letter?
options: Contact CSLB immediately to correct errors
Wait until after you pass the exam to fix it

section4.question: Why is it important to read every CSLB letter carefully?
options: They are optional and mostly informational
They may contain deadlines or requests that, if missed, delay or void your application

section5.question: What is the purpose of the Notice to Appear for Examination?
options: To inform you of your scheduled exam time, date, and location
To confirm you’ve passed the exams

section5.question: What score is required to pass each CSLB exam?
Which of these should you bring to the exam?
options: A valid government-issued photo ID matching your application name
Study notes for reference during the test

section5.question: What should you do if you’re unsure of an answer during the exam?
options: Flag it, make your best guess, and return to it later
Spend as long as needed until you’re certain

section5.question: What can happen if you arrive late for your scheduled exam time?
options: You may be denied entry and forced to reschedule, delaying your license
Nothing; you can still take it
The exam will be postponed automatically

section6.question: What is the purpose of the $15,000 contractor’s bond?
options: To protect the contractor from lawsuits
To protect clients and the public from damages or violations caused by the contractor

section6.question: What must you do if you plan to have employees?
options: Obtain workers’ compensation insurance from a licensed carrier before activation
Nothing until your license is active
Only notify CSLB if an injury occurs

section6.question: What happens if you do not submit your final documents and fees within 90 days of passing the exam?
options: CSLB gives unlimited time to respond
Your application may expire, and you may have to start over

section6.question: Which document must be displayed in your office or workspace once you are licensed?
options: The CSLB wall certificate of licensure

section6.question: What can cause an active license to be suspended automatically?
options: Letting your bond or required insurance lapse
Failing to answer calls from CSLB
